summary: Iteration 85: Backend tests for Draft Workflow and Interactive Pipeline features - ALL 22 TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) GET /api/procedures?phase=1|2|3|4|completed filters work correctly, (2) GET /api/dashboard/stats returns pipeline object for all roles, (3) DELETE /api/procedures/{id} works for incharge only (403 for student/supervisor), (4) Draft procedures return status='draft' on GET.
critical_code_review_comments: Phase filter implementation in GET /api/procedures correctly maps phase numbers to status arrays
Pipeline stats in GET /api/dashboard/stats correctly counts procedures by phase for all roles
DELETE /api/procedures/{id} correctly restricts deletion to implant_incharge role only

Phase status mapping: phase1=[draft,pending_phase1], phase2=[phase1_approved,pending_phase2], phase3=[phase2_approved,pending_stage2_surgical], phase4=[stage2_surgical_approved,pending_stage2_prosthetic,stage2_prosthetic_step1_approved,pending_final_delivery], completed=[completed]
seed_data_creation: Test procedure created and deleted during test_create_and_delete_draft_procedure_by_incharge
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 85 verified the draft workflow and interactive pipeline features. The frontend is React Native (Expo) so cannot be browser-tested. All phase filter and pipeline stats tests pass. DELETE endpoint correctly restricts to implant_incharge role.
